vocab.example: My obsession with building model planes actually stems from my father's career as a pilot.

vocab.meaning: học chơi/thử sức một cách không quá chuyên sâu
vocab.example: I started to dabble in oil painting when I was seven, and it has since become a lifelong passion.

vocab.meaning: kiên trì thực hiện, tiếp tục theo đuổi
vocab.example: Learning the violin was tough initially, but I'm glad I kept at it because it's now my primary way to destress.

vocab.meaning: mang theo, tiếp nối (từ giai đoạn này sang giai đoạn khác)
vocab.example: My fascination with astronomy carried over from my primary school days right into my adult life.

vocab.meaning: nghịch ngợm, mày mò một cách thoải mái
vocab.example: I used to muck about with old electronics in the garage, which eventually led to my hobby of fixing vintage radios.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng sang (lĩnh vực liên quan)
vocab.example: I began with simple sketching as a kid, but later branched out into digital illustration and 3D modeling.

vocab.meaning: ủng hộ, cổ vũ nồng nhiệt (thường nói về sở thích xem thể thao)
vocab.example: I’ve been rooting for the same football team since I was five; it's a family tradition that has never faded.

vocab.meaning: hấp thụ, thu lượm (kiến thức/kỹ năng) một cách say mê
vocab.example: As a child, I would soak up every bit of information about dinosaurs, and I still collect paleontology books today.

vocab.meaning: dồn hết tâm trí và nhiệt huyết vào việc gì
vocab.example: I really threw myself into swimming at a young age, and it remains the only hobby that keeps me grounded.
I look back on my early coin collection with great fondness; it's a hobby that taught me the value of patience.
